nasb.text: He pled the cause of the afflicted and needy; Then it was well. Is not that what it means to know Me?” Declares the Lord.

esv.text: He judged the cause of the poor and needy; then it was well. Is not this to know me? declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 他為困苦和貧窮人伸冤， 那時他得享福樂。 這不是認識我的真義嗎？” 　這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 他为困苦和贫穷的人申冤， 所以他凡事顺利。 这才是真正认识我。 这是耶和华说的。
